description: 12 concepts across 3 ground-truth clusters (animals, programming, cities). Phrases share heavy anchor vocabulary inside each cluster so cosine similarity over kohaku.encode_text reliably exceeds 0.7 within-cluster and stays under 0.4 between clusters.

concepts.label: 🐈 cat
concepts.phrase: the cat purrs as a small wild animal creature living in the forest

concepts.label: 🐕 dog
concepts.phrase: the dog barks as a small wild animal creature living in the forest

concepts.label: 🦁 lion
concepts.phrase: the lion roars as a small wild animal creature living in the forest

concepts.label: 🐦 sparrow
concepts.phrase: the sparrow chirps as a small wild animal creature living in the forest

concepts.label: 🐍 python
concepts.phrase: the python runs as a fast modern code program language we write to build

concepts.label: 🦀 rust
concepts.phrase: the rust runs as a fast modern code program language we write to build

concepts.label: ƒ function
concepts.phrase: the function runs as a fast modern code program block we write to build

concepts.label: 🐛 debugger
concepts.phrase: the debugger runs as a fast modern code program tool we write to build

concepts.label: 🗼 tokyo
concepts.phrase: the tokyo stands as a busy famous historic city place in our world map

concepts.label: 🥐 paris
concepts.phrase: the paris stands as a busy famous historic city place in our world map

concepts.label: ⛩️ kyoto
concepts.phrase: the kyoto stands as a quiet famous historic city place in our world map

concepts.label: 🎡 london
concepts.phrase: the london stands as a busy famous historic city place in our world map
